arabic text: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ
english translation text:
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ اٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text:
O Allah! Send blessings on Muhammad and on the children of Muhammad.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
صَدَقَ اللهُ الْعَظِيْمُ
اَلَّذِيْ لاَاِلٰهَ اِلاَّ هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّوْمُ
english translation text:
Allah is true that He is the Greatest
Such as there is no God but He, the Ever-living, the Eternal
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
ذُوالْجَلاَلِ وَالْاِكْرَامِ
اَلرَّحْمٰنُ الرَّحِيْمُ الْحَلِيْمُ الْكَرِيْمُ
english translation text:
The Lord of majesty and generosity,
the Beneficent, the Merciful, the Benevolent, the Compassionate;
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَلَّذِيْ لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهٖ شَىْءٌ
وَ هُوَ السَّمِيْعُ الْعَلِيْمُ الْبَصِيْرُ الْخَبِيْر
english translation text:
There is nothing and no-one like Him,
He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing, the All-Seeing, the Aware.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
شَهِدَ اللهُ اَنَّهٗ لاَ اِلٰهَ اِلاَّ هُوَ
وَالْمَلآئِكَةُ وَاُولُو الْعِلْمِ قَآئِمًا بِالْقِسْطِ
english translation text:
Allah bears witness that there is no god but He; And (so do) the angels and those who have knowledge, maintaining His creation with justice;
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: لآاِلٰهَ اِلاَّ هُوَ الْعَزِيْزُ الْحَكِيْمُ
english translation text:
There is no God but He, the Mighty, the Wise.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اِنَّ الدِّيْنَ عِنْدَ اللهِ الْاِسْلاَم
وَبَلَّغَتْ رُسُلُهُ الْكِرَامُ
english translation text:
Surely the true religion with Allah is Islam.
His very noble Messengers had declared and made known,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَاَنَا عَلٰى ذٰلِكَ مِنَ الشَّاهِدِيْنَ
english translation text:
and I am of those who bear witness to these facts.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الْمَجْدُ
english translation text:
O Allah! To You belongs all praise, glory,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَلَكَ الْعِزُّ  وَلَكَ الْفَخْرُ
وَلَكَ الْقَهْرُ وَلَكَ النِّعْمَةُ
english translation text:
Honour, pride,
supreme power, bounties,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَلَكَ  الْعَظَمَةُ وَلَكَ  الرَّحْمَةُ
وَلَكَ  الْمَهَابَةُ  وَلَكَ السُّلْطَانُ
english translation text:
greatness, mercy,
reverence, sovereignty,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَلَكَ الْبَهَآءُ وَلَكَ الْاِمْتِنَانُ
وَلَكَ التَّسْبِيْحُ وَلَكَ التَّقْدِيْسُ
english translation text:
beauty, benevolence,
glorification, holiness,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَلَكَ التَّهْلِيْلُ وَلَكَ التَّكْبِيْرُ
english translation text:
“LAA ILAAHA ILLALLAAH”
“Allaahu Akbar”,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَلَكَ مَايُرٰى وَلَكَ مَالاَيُرٰى
english translation text:
that which is seen, that which is not seen,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَلَكَ مَا فَوْقَ السَّمٰوَاتِ الْعُلٰي
وَلَكَ مَا تَحْتَ الثَّرٰى
english translation text:
that which is far above the high heavens,
that which is deep down under the abyss,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَلَكَ الْاَرْضُوْنَ السُّفْلٰى
وَلَكَ الْاٰخِرَةُ وَ الْاُوْلٰى
english translation text:
the worlds below the heavens,
the end and the beginning
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَلَكَ مَا تَرْضٰى بِهِ مِنَ الثَّنَآءِ
وَالْحَمْدِ وَالشُّكْرِ وَالنِّعَمَآءِ
english translation text:
that which You find loveable, beautiful and agreeable out of the felicitation, praise, thanks-giving and response to Your call.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ
وَرَسُوْلِكَ وَاَمِيْنِكَ وَحَبِيْبِكَ وَاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on Muhammad, Your ‘abd, Messenger, confidant and beloved and on the children of Muhammad.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى جِبْرَئِيْلَ اَمِيْنِكَ
عَلٰى وَحْيِكَ وَالْقَوِيِّ عَلٰى اَمْرِكَ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on Jibrail, reliable carrier of Your revelations, prompt and energetic in conveying Your commands,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَالْمُطَاعِ فِىْ سَمٰوَاتِكَ وَمَحَالِّ
كَرَامَاتِكَ الْمُتَحَمِّلِ لِكَلِمَاتِكَ
english translation text:
come and go through heavens carrying out Your orders, operator of Your miracles, porter of Your words
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: النَّاصِرِ لِاَنْبِيَآئِكَ الْمُدَمِّرِ لِاَعْدَآئِكَ
english translation text:
helper of Your Prophets, destroyer of Your enemies.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مِيْكَآئِيْلِ
مَلَكِ رَحْمَتِكَ وَالْمَخْلُوْقِ لِرَاْفَتِكَ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on Mikail, effective courier of Your mercy, created with Your compassion
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَالْمُسْتَغْفِرِ الْمُعِيْنِ لِاَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
english translation text:
and kindness to ask pardon for and be helpful to those who obey You.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى اِسْرَافِيْلَ
حَامِلِ عَرْشِكَ وَصَاحِبِ الصُّوْرِ الْمُنْتَظِرِ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on Israfeel,
bearer of Your Arsh, announcer of the awaited call
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: لِاَمْرِكَ الْوَجِلِ الْمُشْفِقِ مِنْ خِيْفَتِكَ
english translation text:
when You will give the order; cautious, on his guard, in awe of Your reverential fear.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَ صَلِّ عَلٰى عِزْرَآئِيْلَ
قَابِضِ اَرْوَاحِ جَمِيْعِ خَلْقِكَ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on Izraeel
who takes away the souls from all the living beings
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَلّٰلهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى حَمَلَةِ الْعَرْشِ الطَّاهِرِيْنَ
وَعَلٰى مَلآئِكَتِكَ الذِّكْرِ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on the chaste bearers of the Arsh; on the Angels, the reporting emissaries
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَهْلِ تَّآمِّيْنَ عَلٰى دُعَآءِ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ
وَعَلَى السَّفَرَةِ الْكِرَامِ الْبَرَرَةِ الطَّيِّبِيْنَ
english translation text:
who run to and fro tirelessly with the supplications of the faithful,
journeying to do anything in honour of the innocence of the upright,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَعَلٰى مَلَآئِكَتِكَ الْكِرَامِ الْكَاتِبِيْنَ
english translation text:
on the “Kiraamil Kaatibeen” (The two recorders of the deeds);
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَعَلٰى مَلَآئِكَةِ الْجِنَانِ وَخَزَنَةِ النِّيْرَانِ
english translation text:
on the Angels of the Gardens, storehouses of the bright lights,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَمَلَكِ الْمَوْتِ وَالْاَعْوَانِ
english translation text:
the angels of death and the helpers.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: يَاذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَالْاِكْرَامِ
english translation text:
O the Owner of majesty and honour.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَلّٰلهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى اَبِيْنَا اٰدَمَ بَدِيْعِ فِطْرَتِكَ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on our father, Adam, Your flesh and blood original creation,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَلَّذِيْ كَرَّمْتَهٗ بِسُجُوْدِ مَلآئِكَتِكَ وَاَبَحْتَهٗ جَنَّتَكَ
english translation text:
whom You distinguished by making Your Angels prostrate themselves in adoration before him and admitted him into Your paradise.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى اُمِّنَا حَوَّآءَ اَلْمُطَهَّرَةِ مِنَ الرِّجْسِ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on our mother, Hawwaa, kept safe from impurity.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَلْمُصَفَّاتِ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ اَلْمُفَضَّلَةِ  مِنَ الْاِنْسِ
اَلْمُتَرَدِّدَةِ بَيْنَ مَحَالِّ الْقُدْسِ
english translation text:
and foulness endowed with love for mankind; a dweller in the sacred quarters.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى هَابِيْلَ وَشِيْثٍ
وَاِدْرِيْسَ وَنُوْحٍ وَهُوْدٍ وَصَالِحٍ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on Habeel,  Sheeth, Idrees, Nuh, Hud, Saleh,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَاِبْرَاهِيْمَ وَاِسْمٰعِيلَ وَاِسْحٰقَ
وَيَعْقُوْبَ وَيُوْسُفَ وَالْاَسْبَاطِ وَلُوْطٍ
english translation text:
Ibrahim, Ismail, Ishaq,
Yaqub, Yusuf, Isbat, Lut,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَشُعَيْبٍ وَاَيُّوْبَ وَمُوْسٰى وَهٰرُوْنَ
وَيُوْشَعَ وَمِيْشَا وَالْخِضْرِ
english translation text:
Shuayb, Ayoub, Musa, Harun,
Yusha, Meesaa, Khizr,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَذِى الْقَرْنَيْنِ وَيُوْنُسَ وَاِلْيَاسَ
وَالْيَسْعَ وَذِى الْكِفْلِ وَطَالُوْتَ
english translation text:
Zil Qarnayn, Yunus, Ilyas,
Yas’a, Zil Kifl, Talut,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَدَاوُدَ وَسُلَيْمَانَ وَزَكَرِيَّا وَيَحْيٰ
وَتُوْرَخَ وَمَتّٰى وَاِرْمِيَا وَحَيْقُوْقَ
english translation text:
Dawud, Sulayman, Zakariya, Yahya,
Turakh, Matta, Irmiya, Hayquq,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَدَانِيَالَ وَعُزَيْرٍ وَعِيْسٰى وَشَمْعُوْنَ
english translation text:
Daniyal, Uzayr, Isa, Shamoon,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَجِرْجِيْسَ وَالْحَوَارِيِّيْنَ وَالْاَتْبَاعِ
وَخَالِدَ وَحَنْظَلَةَ  وَلُقْمَانَ
english translation text:
Jirgis (and the obedient true disciples of Isa), Hanzalah and Luqman.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَللّٰهُمَ صَلِّ عَلٰى مَحَمَّدٍ وَّاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on Muhammad and on the children of Muhammad;
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَارْحَمْ مُحَمَّدًا وَّاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text:
envelop Muhammad and the children of Muhammad with Your mercy;
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَبَارِكْ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّاٰلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text:
let Muhammad and the children of Muhammad be praised and hallowed;
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ وَرَحِمْتَ وَبَارَكْتَ
عَلٰى اِبْرَاهِيْمَ وَاٰلِ اِبْرَاهِيْمَ
english translation text:
as You blessed, mercified and made happy Ibrahim and the children of Ibrahim
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اِنَّكَ حَمِيْدٌ مُجِيْدٌ
english translation text:
Verily You are Praiseworthy, Glorious.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى الْاَوْصِيَآءِ
وَ السُّعَدَآءِ وَ الشُّهَدَآءِ وَاَئِمَّةِ الْهُدٰى
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on the Aimma [the descendents of Your Prophet Muhammad (pbuh)] the successors, the fortunate martyrs, who guided the mankind to Your path.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَ صَلِّ عَلَى الْاَبْدَالِ وَلْاَوْتَادِ
وَالسُّيَّاحِ وَالعُبَّادِ وَالْمُخْلِصِيْنَ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on the moderate, on the rammed-in, on the travelling, on the enslaved, on the freed,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَالزُّهَادِ وَاَهْلِ الْجِدِّ وَ الْاِجْتِهَادِ
وَاخْصُصْ مُحَمَّدًا وَّاَهْلَ بَيْتِهٖ
english translation text:
on the ascetic and on the earnestly seeking perfection in the knowledge; and singularise Muhammad and his children
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
بِاَفْضَلِ صَلَوَاتِكَ وَاَجْزِلِ كَرَامَاتِكَ
وَبَلِّغْ رُوْحَهُ وَ جَسَدَهٗ مِنِّيْ
english translation text:
with Your best blessings, be liberal and give much in addition; let my invocation of blessings reach his body and soul,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
تَحِيَّةً وَسَلاَمًا وَزِدْهُ فَضْلاً وَشَرَفًا وَكَرَمًا
حَتّٰى تُبَلِّغَهٗ اَعْلٰى دَرَجَاتِ
english translation text:
distinct and wholesome, and bestow benefits on him, in abundance, the best, super passing in grace and nobility, till he occupies entirely the highest position
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَهْلِ الشَّرَفِ مِنَ النَّبِيِّيْنَ
وَالْمُرْسَلِيْنَ وَالْاَفَاضِلِ الْمُقَّرَّبِيْنَ
english translation text:
among the distinguished Prophets
Messengers and preferred favourites.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مَنْ سَمَّيْتُ
وَمَنْ لَّمْ اُسَمِّ مِنْ مَلآئِكَتِكَ
english translation text:
O Allah send blessings on those, I have referred to and on those, I have not quoted, from among Your Angels
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَ اَنْبِيَآئِكَ وَرُسُلِكَ وَاَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
وَاَوْصِلْ صَلَوٰاتِىْ اِلَيْهِمْ وَاِلٰى اَرْوَاحِهِمْ
english translation text:
Prophets, Messengers and Your devoted servants, and let my invocation “to send blessings” reach them,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْهُمْ اِخْوَانِىْ فِيْكَ وَاَعْوَانِىْ عَلٰى دُعَآئِكَ
english translation text:
make them “the like of me” in this matter, and be my co-prayers.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّى اَسْتَشْفِعُ بِكَ اِلَيْكَ وَبِكَرَمِكَ اِلٰى كَرَمِكَ
english translation text:
O Allah I turn to You in Your name to ask for Your intercession in the name of Your Generosity for Your kindness,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَبِجُوْدِكَ اِلٰى جُوْدِكَ
وَبِرَحْمَتِكَ اِلٰى رَحْمَتِكَ
english translation text:
in the name of Your liberality for Your benefits, in the name of Your compassion for Your mercy,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَبِاَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ اِلَيْكَ وَاَسْئَلُكَ
english translation text:
and in the name of Your devoted servants who turn to You.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَللّٰهُمَّ بِكُلِّ مَا سَئَلَكَ بِهٖ اَحَدٌ مِنْهُمْ
مِنْ مَسْئَلَةٍ شَرِيْفَةٍ غَيْرَ مَرْدُوْدَةٍ
english translation text:
I beseech You O Allah for the whole of that which any one of them asked for in the matter of (their) close at hand dominating difficulties, never turned down,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
يَا اللهُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَارَحِيْمُ
يَاحَلِيْمُ يَاكَرِيْمُ يَاعَظِيْمُ

O Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful,
The Forebearer, the Generous, the Maginificient,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَبِمَا دَعَوْكَ بِهٖ مِنْ دَعْوَةٍ مُجَابَةٍ غَيْرِ مُخَيَّبَةٍ
english translation text:
whereby (their) desires in the matter of (their) affairs received fulfilment, never left deluded in their hope.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
يَاجَلِيْلُ يَامُنِيْلُ يَاجَمِيْلُ

DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:

يَامُنِيْعُ يَامُدِيْلُ يَامُحِيْلُ

the Lenient Supporter, the Knowing, the Luminary, the Invulnerable, the Unseeable, the Lawgiver,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:

the Great, the Omnipotent, the Seer, the Rewarder of thankfulness, the Source of all goodness, the Purifier, the pure, the Wielder of absolute power,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
يَاظَاهِرُ يَابَاطِنُ يَاسَاتِرُ

the Manifest, the Hidden, the Covering Shelter, the Encompassing Guardian, the Powerful, the Preserver,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:

يَاحَمِيْدُ يَامَجِيْدُ  يَامُبْدِ ئُ يَامُعِيْدُ

the Helper of the needy, the Neighbour, the Loving Friend, the Praised, the Glorified, the Originator, the Restorer,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
يَامُرْشِدُ يَامُسَدِّدُ يَامُعْطِىْ

the Leader who leads on the Right Path, the Redeemer who grants compensation, the Very Liberal who gives out freely, the Protector, the Defender, the Exalter,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
يَاعَطُوْفُ يَاكَافِىْ يَاشَافِىْ
يَامُعَافِىْ يَامُكَافِىْ يَاوَفِىُّ
english translation text:

restores to health, pardons, requits, carries out completely,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَتَفْتَحَ لِىْ كُلَّ بَابٍ وَتُلَيِّنَ لِىْ كُلَّ صَعْبٍ
english translation text:

make light the burdens that trouble me,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَتُسَهِّلَ لِىْ كُلَّ عَسِيْرٍ وَتُخْرِسَ عَنِّىْ كُلَّ نَاطِقٍ بِّشَرٍّ
english translation text:
make easy the difficulties that press hard upon me,
render dumb every tongue that speaks evil of me,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَتَكُفَّ عَنِّىْ كُلَّ بَاغٍ وَتَكْبِتَ عَنِّىْ عَدُوٍّ لِىْ وَحَاسِدٍ
english translation text:

destroy every envious enemy who wants to put me to shame,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَتَمْنَعَ مِنِّىْ كُلَّ ظَالِمٍ وَتَكْفِيَنِىْ كُلَّ عَآئِقٍ يَحُوْلُ بَيْنِىْ وَبَيْنَ حَاجَتِىْ
english translation text:

DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَيُحَاوِلُ اَنْ يُفَرِّقَ بَيْنِىْ وَبَيْنَ طَاعَتِكَ
وَيُثَبِّطَنِىْ عَنْ عِبَادَتِكَ
english translation text:

DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: يَامَنْ اَلْجَمَ الْجِنَّ الْمُتَمَرِّدِيْنَ وَقَهَرَ عُتَاةِ الشَّيَاطِيْنَ

DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَاَذَلَّ رِقَابَ الْمُتَجَبِّرِيْنَ وَرَدَّكَيْدَ الْمُتَسَلِّطِيْنَ عَنِ الْمُسْتَضْعَفِيْنَ
english translation text:

DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَسْئَلُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلٰى مَا تَشَآءُ

DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَنْ تَجْعَلَ قَضَآءَ حَاجَتِىْ فِيْمَا تَشَآءُ
english translation text:
take a decision in the matter of my desires while You will.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

[Go into sajda and put either side of your face on the earth, one after the other and recite:]
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ سَجَدْتُ وَبِكَ اٰمَنْتُ

O Allah I prostrate myself before You in adoration and put faith in You,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:

وَتَضَرُّعِىْ وَمَسْكَنَتِىْ وَفَقْرِىْ اِلَيْكَ  يَارَبِّ

so take pity on my humiliation, helplessness, struggle against difficulties, near collapse, misery and broke fortune, O my Lord!
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: يَاقَاضِىَ حَوَائِجِ الطَّالِبِيْنَ اِقْضِ حَاجَتِىْ بِلُطْفِكَ يَاخَفِىَّ الْاَلْطَافِ
english translation text:
(O He who satisfies the needs of those who ask, satisfy my request with Your Subtlety, O the one who makes available help through subtlety.

ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ وَبَارَكْتَ وَرَحِمْتَ
عَلٰى اِبْرَاهِيْمَ وَاٰلِ اِبْرَاهِيْمَ اِنَّكَ حَمِيْدٌ مَجِيْدٌ
english translation text:
as You blessed, sanctified and comforted Ibrahim and the children of Ibrahim! Verily You are praiseworthy, Almighty!
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَارْحَمْ ذُلِّىْ وَفَاقَتِىْ وَفَقْرِىْ
وَانْفِرَادِىْ وَوَحْدَتِىْ وَخُضُوْعِىْ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
english translation text:
Have mercy on my humiliation, helplessness, insufficiency, timidity, aloneness and submissiveness before You
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَاعْتِمَادِىْ عَلَيْكَ وَتَضَرُّعِىْ اِلَيْكَ
اَدْعُوْكَ دُعَآءَ الْخَاضِعِ الذَّلِيْلِ
english translation text:
I rely upon You, I approach You furtively, I call upon You the prayer of a submissive, humble,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَلْخَاشِعِ الْخَآئِفِ الْمُشَفِقِ الْبَآئِسِ
اَلْمَهِيْنِ الْحَقِيْرِ الْجَآئِعِ الْفَقِيْرِ
english translation text:
low, frightened, worried, miserable, weak, modest, earthly, needy,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
اَلْعَآئِذِ الْمُسْتَجِيْرِ الْمُقِرِّ بِذَنْبِهِ
اَلْمُسْتَغْفِرِ مِنْهُ الْمُسْتَكِيْنِ لِرَبِّهِ
english translation text:
refugee seeking asylum, confessing sins, asking for forgiveness and tranquillity from his Lord;
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
دُعَآءَ مَنْ اَسْلَمَتْهُ ثِقَتُهُ وَرَفَضَتْهُ اَحِبَّتُهُ
وَعَظُمَتْ فَجِيْعَتُهُ دُعَآءَ حَرِقٍ حَزِيْنٍ
english translation text:
The cry of a supplicant who expected help but was betrayed and abandoned by his friends and therefore his agony is terrible, now sour, sad,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: ضَعِيْفٍ مَهِيِنٍ بَآئِسٍ مُسْتَكِيِنٍ بِكَ مُسْتَجِيْرٌ
english translation text:
sick, small, poor and disgusted turns to You pleading for sanctuary.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَسْئَلُكَ بِاَنَّكَ مَلِيْكٌ
english translation text:
O Allah I beseech You because You are the Absolute Sovereign
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَاَنَّكَ مَاتَشَآءُ مِنْ اَمْرٍ يَكُوْنُ
وَاَنَّكَ عَلٰى مَاتَشَآءُ قَدِيِرٌ
english translation text:
and verily that which You desire takes effect and verily that which You will; You are able to do.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَاَسْئَلُكَ بِحُرْمَةِ هَذَا الشَّهْرِ الْحَرَامِ
وَالْبَيْتِ الْحَرَامِ وَالْبَلَدِ الَحَرَامِ وَالرُّكْنِ وَالْمَقَامِ
english translation text:
I beseech You in the name of this sacred month, the sacred City, the Rukn and the Maqaam,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَالْمَشَاعِرِ الْعِظَامِ وَبِحَقِّ نَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ
english translation text:
the majestic places where the multitude of Hajis (pilgrims) performs the holy rites in Ka’ba and in the name of Your Prophet Muhammad, peace be on him.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
يَامَنْ وَهَبَ لِاٰدَمَ شِيْثًا
وَلِاِبْرَاهِيْمَ اِسْمٰعِيِلَ وَاِسْحٰقَ
english translation text:
O He who prepared and presented Sheeth to Adam,
Ismail and Ishaaq to Ibrahim!
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَيَامَنْ رَدَّ يُوْسُفَ عَلٰى يَعْقُوبَ
english translation text:
O He who brought back Yusuf to Yaqub!
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَيَا مَنْ كَشَفَ بَعْدَ الْبَلآءِ ضُرَّ اَيُّوْب
english translation text:
O He who dispersed the sorrows, distressing Ayyub, after the test and trial!
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
يَارَآدَّ مُوْسٰى عَلٰى اُمِّهِ
وَزَآئِدِ الْخِضْرِ فِىْ عِلْمِهٖ
english translation text:
O He who returned Musa to his mother
and made Khizr grow in his wisdom!
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَيَا مَنْ وَهَبَ لِدَاوٗدَ سُلَيْمَانَ
وَلِزَكَرِيَّا يَحْيَى وَلِمَرْيَمَ عِيْسٰ
english translation text:
O He who prepared and presented Sulayman to Dawud
Yahya to Zakariyya and Isa to Maryam!
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
يَاحَافِظَ بِنْتِ شُعَيْبٍ
وَيَاكَافِلَ وَلَدِ اُمِّ مُوْسٰى
english translation text:
O He who guarded the daughter
of Shuayb!
O He who took charge of the safety of the child of the mother of Musa!
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: اَسْئَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّىَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّاٰلِ مَحَمَّدٍ
english translation text:
I Beseech You to send blessings on Muhammad and on the children of Muhammad,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text: وَ اَنْ تَغْفِرْ لِىْ ذُنُوْبِىْ كُلَّهَا وَتُجِيْرَنِىْ مِنْ عَذَابِكَ
english translation text:
and to absolve me from all my transgressions, set me free from the application of Your punishment,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَتُوْجِبَ لِىْ رِضْوَانَكَ وَاَمَانَكَ
وَاِحْسَانَكَ وَغُفْرَانَكَ وَجِنَانَكَ
english translation text:
oblige me with Your approval, protection, favours, pardon and sanctuary.
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO

arabic text:
وَاَسْئَلُكَ اَنْ تَفُكَّ عَنِّىْ
كُلَّ حَلْقَةٍ بَيْنِىْ وَبَيْنَ مَنْ يُّؤْذِيْنِىْ
english translation text:
I beseech You to untie me from all the links that connect me with those who wrong me,
DUA UMMI DAWUD
DUA UMMI DAWUD
ISIJ OF TORONTO
